plan.title: TNF auth reliability audit: find root causes for SUPER_ADMIN denial paths and malformed /api/auth/me responses; produce
plan.suggestedCommitMessage:
fix(auth): implement me endpoint and super_admin bypass

- Moved AuthController to `api/auth` to match frontend expectations.
- Implemented `me` endpoint (`@Get('me')`) in AuthController to return user profile.
- Added `validateFirebaseToken` in AuthService to handle Firebase token verification and JIT user provisioning.
- Updated RolesGuard to support case-insensitive role matching and explicit SUPER_ADMIN bypass.
- Added unit tests for AuthController and RolesGuard.

plan.title: TNF auth reliability audit: find root causes for SUPER_ADMIN denial paths and malformed /api/auth/me responses; produce
plan.suggestedCommitMessage:
fix(auth): correct SUPER_ADMIN role checks and add /api/auth/me endpoint

- Changed `AuthController` prefix to `api/auth` to match frontend expectations.
- Added `GET /api/auth/me` endpoint to return user profile, fixing 404/malformed response issues.
- Updated `AuthService` to include `validateFirebaseToken` for validating frontend tokens and syncing users (JIT provisioning).
- Updated `RolesGuard` to implement case-insensitive role matching and explicit `SUPER_ADMIN` bypass.
- Added unit tests for `AuthController` and `RolesGuard`.
- Updated `auth.security.spec.ts` to mock `firebase-admin` and `ConfigService`.

plan.title: TNF framework evolution audit: propose high-impact changes for orchestration reliability, delegation protocols, observab
plan.suggestedCommitMessage:
feat: add TNF framework evolution audit

Added `TNF_FRAMEWORK_AUDIT.md` containing a comprehensive audit of the framework's orchestration reliability, delegation protocols, observability, and CI quality gates. The document includes detailed analysis of the current state and high-impact proposals with measurable KPIs for evolution to a production-grade architecture.

plan.title: TNF framework evolution audit: propose high-impact changes for orchestration reliability, delegation protocols, observab
plan.suggestedCommitMessage:
docs: add TNF framework evolution audit report

- Adds `TNF_FRAMEWORK_AUDIT.md` detailing proposals for orchestration, delegation, observability, and CI.
- Identifies critical gaps in `UnifiedWorkflowEngine` (in-memory state), `RelayCore` (loose typing), and `agent-coordination` (testing).
- Proposes BullMQ migration, Zod schemas, OpenTelemetry integration, and strict testing gates.

plan.title: TNF framework evolution audit: propose high-impact changes for orchestration reliability, delegation protocols, observab
plan.suggestedCommitMessage:
docs: add TNF framework evolution audit report

Added `TNF_FRAMEWORK_AUDIT.md` detailing the current state and proposed improvements for:
1. Orchestration Reliability (move to BullMQ, remove polling).
2. Delegation Protocols (introduce strict Zod schemas).
3. Observability (OpenTelemetry integration, unified metrics).
4. CI Quality Gates (enable tests, mutation testing).

Includes measurable KPIs for each area.
